title: OmniFormatter C# / F# Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for C# and F#. Defaults match the .NET SDK editorconfig conventions.

braceStyle.description: [C#] Allman style is the historical C# default; K&R is used in modern .editorconfig defaults.

quoteStyle.description: [C#] String literal quote style. Double quotes are the C# standard.

namingConvention.description: [C#] Types, methods, properties, and namespaces use PascalCase; fields/locals use camelCase.

usingOrdering.description: [C#] Ordering of using directives. System.* first is the dotnet standard.

endOfLine.description: .NET projects are Windows-native; CRLF is the default.

fsharp__indentationSpaces.description: [F#] Spaces per indentation level. F# uses significant whitespace.

fsharp__pipeStyle.description: [F#] Whether to place each pipe |> on its own line in pipeline chains.
